rows.notes: Supervisor visually verified that no amounts are present for this row. gemini-flash correctly extracted empty amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted amounts from the subsequent row, a critical systematic error that impacts all subsequent amount extractions from gpt-5-mini. Description 'Slopou' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate than 'Slepson' from gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Annual rent due from Sayer for the property/holding called Slopou.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent due from Sayer for Slopou; amount not recorded.

rows.description: Gouwear Rect pro an: et 8th part. an:
rows.notes: Supervisor visually verified amounts as £75 0s 0d and description. gemini-flash correctly extracted both. gpt-5-mini extracted incorrect amounts for this row (due to systematic shift) and made several errors in the description, notably 'Grounear' instead of 'Gouwear', 'Rest' instead of 'Rect', and 'the' instead of the clear '8th'.
rows.english_description: Annual income from the Gouwear rectory (including an eighth part of a year noted).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual income from the Gouwear rectory (including an eighth part), amounting to £75 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Supervisor visually verified amounts as £22 10s 0d. gemini-flash correctly extracted amounts and provided a more plausible description 'Emmes Backgete pro Brum: & Tim:'. gpt-5-mini extracted incorrect amounts (due to systematic shift). gemini-flash's notes showed careful consideration of description ambiguity, which increased trust.
rows.english_description: Receipt from Emmes Backgete covering the Brum (winter/Michaelmas) and Trinity terms.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Emmes Backgete for the Brum (winter/Michaelmas) and Trinity terms, amounting to £22 10s 0d.

rows.description: Will Arish pro Truin: & 3rd part. an:
rows.notes: Supervisor visually verified amounts as £18 15s 0d. gemini-flash correctly extracted amounts and provided a superior description 'Will Arish pro Truin: & 3rd part. an:'. gpt-5-mini extracted incorrect amounts (due to systematic shift) and had less accurate description, particularly misinterpreting '3rd' as 'yr'. gemini-flash's note regarding the '3rd' interpretation is strong evidence of careful analysis.
rows.english_description: Receipt from William Arish for the Trinity term and a third part of the annual rent.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from William Arish for the Trinity term and one-third part of the year, amounting to £18 15s 0d.

rows.description: Gily Hale nuper Franklyn, pro an: & (lepoys)
rows.notes: Supervisor visually verified amounts as £1 18s 0d. gemini-flash correctly extracted amounts and provided a significantly more accurate description 'Gily Hale nuper Franklyn, pro an: & (lepoys)'. gpt-5-mini extracted incorrect amounts (due to systematic shift and an internal error in the shillings value for its source row) and made a major misreading of 'nuper' as 'mayor', and 'lepoys' as 'Capsey', also missing the parentheses.
rows.english_description: Annual rent from Gily Hale, noted as formerly a franklin; parenthetical note unclear.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual rent from Gily Hale (formerly a franklin), amounting to £1 18s 0d.

rows.notes: Supervisor visually verified amounts as £6 0s 0d. gemini-flash correctly extracted amounts and provided a significantly more accurate description 'Lucas Ston (Drew.) pro Truin:'. gpt-5-mini extracted incorrect amounts (due to systematic shift) and misread 'Ston' as 'Eaton' and '(Drew.)' as '(Browe)'.

rows.description: B’d arrears vide et supra in former acts

For row_type, 'entry' is chosen as a descriptive record or note within the ledger, as it is not a direct sum ('total') nor a section heading ('header').
